hooks.command: staged="$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null)"; printf '%s\n' "$staged" | grep -q '^src/mm_jira_bot/' && ! printf '%s\n' "$staged" | grep -qE 'docs/|AGENTS|README|CHANGELOG' && printf '%s' '{"systemMessage":"Doc-sync (CLAUDE.md): в индексе есть изменения src/mm_jira_bot/, но не staged ни docs/, ни AGENTS.md/README.md/CHANGELOG.md. Коммит не блокирую — если правка поведенческая/архитектурная, обнови нужный doc и перегенерируй docs/reference/service-map.md (scripts/gen_service_map.py).","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Doc-sync reminder: staged code under src/mm_jira_bot/ without any of docs/**, AGENTS.md, README.md, or CHANGELOG.md staged. Per CLAUDE.md update the relevant doc; if public signatures/routes/mixins/files changed, regenerate docs/reference/service-map.md (the gate gen_service_map.py --check step enforces this)."}}'; exit 0
